text.content: JUST RELEASED: ALL-NEW MAXAM MS913 FOR E3/L3 CONSTRUCTION APPLICATIONS

rich_text.plain_text: JUST RELEASED: ALL-NEW MAXAM MS913 FOR E3/L3 CONSTRUCTION APPLICATIONS

text.content: MAXAM Tire North America Inc.ENGINEERED TO TACKLE THE TOUGHEST TASKS introduces the all-new MS913 as the latest product development to compliment the current comprehensive line-up for OTR applications. The E3/L3 rock lug pattern of the MAXAM MS913 combines excellent traction in all off-road conditions with an open shoulder design which contributes to increased reliability, durability and performance.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire North America Inc.ENGINEERED TO TACKLE THE TOUGHEST TASKS introduces the all-new MS913 as the latest product development to compliment the current comprehensive line-up for OTR applications. The E3/L3 rock lug pattern of the MAXAM MS913 combines excellent traction in all off-road conditions with an open shoulder design which contributes to increased reliability, durability and performance.

text.content: “Enhancing our existing MAXAM product line and first-class business solutions, the MS913 combines premium compounding technology and cost-efficient bias construction to deliver industry-leading performance and value,” said Jimmy McDonnell, Vice President, Sales & Marketing, MAXAM Tire North America Inc.

rich_text.plain_text: “Enhancing our existing MAXAM product line and first-class business solutions, the MS913 combines premium compounding technology and cost-efficient bias construction to deliver industry-leading performance and value,” said Jimmy McDonnell, Vice President, Sales & Marketing, MAXAM Tire North America Inc.

text.content: The MAXAM MS913 utilizes a heavy duty under tread for improved puncture resistance and sidewall protection with proven wear and cut resistant compounds for added safety and reduction of downtime related costs.

rich_text.plain_text: The MAXAM MS913 utilizes a heavy duty under tread for improved puncture resistance and sidewall protection with proven wear and cut resistant compounds for added safety and reduction of downtime related costs.

text.content: The key features and performance of the MS913 are part of the ongoing commitment to provide unmatched quality and value to the tough demands of construction operations, particularly when it comes to our outstanding level of experience in logistics, sales and service solutions.

rich_text.plain_text: The key features and performance of the MS913 are part of the ongoing commitment to provide unmatched quality and value to the tough demands of construction operations, particularly when it comes to our outstanding level of experience in logistics, sales and service solutions.

text.content: The MAXAM MS913 is currently available to order in five core sizes for various E3/L3 vehicle applications to suit the needs of your business. For additional information, please visit maxamtirena.com
